mapper.select: SELECT id, work_item_type, name, version_no, status, is_default, created_at, updated_at FROM workflow_definition ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, work_item_type, name, version_no, status, is_default, created_at, updated_at FROM workflow_definition WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, work_item_type, name, version_no, status, is_default, created_at, updated_at FROM workflow_definition WHERE work_item_type = #{workItemType}

SELECT id, workflow_definition_id, node_key, name, order_no, skill_name, input_policy, output_artifact_type, output_name_template, retry_limit, timeout_seconds, required_confirmation FROM workflow_node_definition WHERE workflow_definition_id = #{workflowDefinitionId} ORDER BY order_no ASC

SELECT wni.id, wni.workflow_instance_id, wni.node_definition_id, wni.status, wni.input_artifact_id, wni.output_artifact_id, wni.agent_session_id, wni.runtime_session_id, wni.started_at, wni.completed_at, wni.error_message, wni.version FROM workflow_node_instance wni JOIN workflow_node_definition wnd ON wni.node_definition_id = wnd.id WHERE wni.workflow_instance_id = #{workflowInstanceId} ORDER BY wnd.order_no ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workflow_instance (id, work_item_id, workflow_definition_id, status, current_node_instance_id, started_at, completed_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{workItemId}, #{workflowDefinitionId}, #{status}, #{currentNodeInstanceId}, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE workflow_instance SET status = #{status}, current_node_instance_id = #{currentNodeInstanceId}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workflow_node_instance (id, workflow_instance_id, node_definition_id, status, input_artifact_id, output_artifact_id, agent_session_id, runtime_session_id, started_at, completed_at, error_message, version) VALUES (#{id}, #{workflowInstanceId}, #{nodeDefinitionId}, #{status}, #{inputArtifactId}, #{outputArtifactId}, #{agentSessionId}, #{runtimeSessionId}, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{errorMessage}, #{version})
mapper.update: UPDATE workflow_node_instance SET status = #{status}, output_artifact_id = #{outputArtifactId}, agent_session_id = #{agentSessionId}, runtime_session_id = #{runtimeSessionId}, started_at = #{startedAt}, input_artifact_id = #{inputArtifactId}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, workflow_instance_id, node_definition_id, status, input_artifact_id, output_artifact_id, agent_session_id, runtime_session_id, started_at, completed_at, error_message, version FROM workflow_node_instance WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, work_item_id, workflow_definition_id, status, current_node_instance_id, started_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM workflow_instance WHERE work_item_id = #{workItemId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
